data.content:
Implementation review:
- Verified the diff matches the knot request: Setlist now paginates in 12-step windows, opens on the page containing the first unfinished beat, and preserves earlier completed beats behind the Earlier button.
- Confirmed coverage in `src/lib/__tests__/setlist-chart.test.ts` for unfinished-beat anchoring, all-terminal fallback, and single-page behavior at 12 steps.
- Re-ran sanity gates successfully: `bun run lint`, `bunx tsc --noEmit`, `bun run test`, and `bun run build`.
- Pushed commit `263d94ea` to both `origin/worktree-foolery-7e78-setlist-pagination` and `origin/main`.
